headline: BMO Capital Maintains Outperform on Alliant Energy, Raises Price Target to $83
summary: BMO Capital  analyst James Thalacker   maintains Alliant Energy (NASDAQ:LNT) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $81 to $83.
